20 using namespace Arcane;
21 
22 class IPatchGenerator
23 {
24 
25 public:
26 
28  IPatchGenerator() {};
30  virtual ~IPatchGenerator() {};
31 
32 
33 public:
34 
35  virtual SharedArray<Patch*> PatchesList() = 0;
36 
38  virtual void init(ISubDomain* sd, IMesh * mesh, IntegerConstArrayView mesh_limiters, IntegerConstArrayView axis_cells_nb) = 0;
39 
40  virtual void settlePatch(Patch* patch) = 0;
41 
42  virtual bool checkPatch(Patch* patch, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
43 
44  virtual Real getEfficiency(Patch* patch, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
45 
46  virtual IntegerSharedArray computeSignature(Patch* patch, const Integer& axis_id, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
47 
48  virtual void splitPatch(Patch* patch, const Integer& axis_id, const Integer& cut_index, SharedArray<Patch*>& tmp_patches_list) = 0;
49 
50  virtual bool findHole(Patch* patch, const Integer& axis_id, Integer& cut_index, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
51 
52  virtual bool findInflection(Patch* patch, Integer& axis_id, Integer& cut_index, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
53 
54  virtual bool testEfficiency(Patch* patch, const Integer& max_length,const Integer& axis_id, Integer& cut_index, RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
55 
56  virtual void createPatchesFromCriteria(RealConstArrayView flagged_cells_ids) = 0;
57 
58  virtual void computeGroups(IItemFamily* current_family,IItemFamily* new_family) = 0;
59 
60 };
